tokens.text: has placement position and direction traits

generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.title: Block Traits
generatedFromSchema_doNotEdit.description: Change the placement position and direction behavior of a block

fields.title: Minecraft Connection
fields.description: Adds connection states to the block. The values of these states are updated when the block or neighboring blocks change.

fields.title: Minecraft Placement Direction
fields.description: Adds the "minecraft:cardinal_direction", "minecraft:facing_direction" and/or "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" states and setter function to the block.
fields.technicalDescription: "y_rotation_offset" can only be used when "minecraft:cardinal_direction" and/or "minecraft:facing_direction" are enabled in "enabled_states". and "blocks_to_corner_with" can only be used when "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" is enabled in "enabled_states".

fields.title: Minecraft Placement Position
fields.description: Adds the "minecraft:block_face" and/or "minecraft:vertical_half" states and setter function to the block.
